meaning: n.博茨瓦纳(位于南非共和国内,于1966年独立)
examples: If the method works, it could provide farmers in Botswana—and elsewhere—with a low-cost, sustainable tool to protect their livestock, and a way to keep lions safe from being killed.
A worker sorts diamonds in Botswana.
Before the cold war ended, only three small African countries were proper democracies: Botswana, Mauritius and Senegal.
Edna Wilhermina Swaniker started a school in Botswana and has been an educator for 29 years.
